content.hint: 当不确定是否还有其他欠款时，常用表达是询问是否存在其他未结清费用。

blanks.answer: there are any other outstanding fees
options: there are any other outstanding fees

content.situation: 你去学校财务办公室确认学费缴纳情况，工作人员告诉你学费已付清，但你不确定是否包含其他费用，想进一步确认是否有其他未结清款项。
content.speakerText: Your tuition is fully settled. Is there anything else you need to take care of?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的学费已全部付清。还有其他需要处理的费用吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 确认费用状态的礼貌询问结构
content.responseTemplate: I'm not sure—I was wondering if ___

content.hint: 当对退款有疑问时，应先澄清自己没有多付款，避免误解。
content.situation: 你收到邮件通知有退款，但你记得自己没有多交钱，想向工作人员核实是否系统出错。
content.speakerText: We've processed a refund for you. Do you want it sent to your bank account or by check?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们已经为你处理了退款。你希望打到银行卡还是寄支票？
content.knowledgePoint: 对异常退款的合理质疑表达
content.responseTemplate: Actually, I think there might be a mistake—___

content.hint: 在支付后确认账户状态时，常用表达是询问所有费用是否已结清。

blanks.answer: all my charges are now cleared
options: all my charges are now cleared

content.situation: 你刚完成在线缴费，但不确定是否成功，想请工作人员帮你核对账户状态，确认是否还有欠款。
content.speakerText: I just paid my tuition online, but I'm not sure if it went through. Could you check my account?
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚在线支付了学费，但不确定是否成功，你能帮我查一下账户吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 支付后确认费用结清的请求句型

content.hint: 当你怀疑自己已缴费但系统显示未付时，常用此句型请求重新核查
content.template: I thought I paid it—can you check ___ again?
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：check again（重新核查）

content.hint: 选择银行转账时，常因没有本地地址而无法接收支票
content.template: Bank transfer, please—I don't have a local ___ yet.

content.hint: 在确认缴费时，询问当前账户余额是常见表达
content.template: Could you tell me my current ___ balance?
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：account balance（账户余额）
